---
title: "<i>Record, The</i>"
---

## <i>Record, The</i>

**Type:** periodical

### About

Weekly newspaper, published in London 1828-1948.  It was Evangelical and anti-Tractarian.  It merged with the <i>Church of England Newspaper</i> and ran 1949-1969 as the <i>Church of England Newspaper and the Record</i>.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
